case_title: ANNA LAW et al VS. PHILIP NG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY LAW, ANNA HSUEH, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT NG, PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$215.00) SERVED JUN-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, PHILIP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW, ANNA HSUEH, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, PHILIP $3,171.11 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,436.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
